description: Edge: All utility/draw hand — no direct damage cards

hand.name: Recycle
hand.description: Draw 3 cards. Charge bonus: recover from discard.

hand.name: Foresight
hand.description: Draw 2 cards. Charge bonus: reveal enemy intent.

hand.name: Adapt
hand.description: Smart: Block vs ATK (enemy attacking!), Cleanse vs debuff, else Attack.

relics.name: Swift Boots
relics.description: Draw 6 cards per turn instead of 5.

notes: EDGE CASE: Zero direct damage cards in hand. Enemy incoming 12 dmg. Adapt vs ATK intent = Block effect. Must draw to find attack cards. Optimal: Foresight (free, draws 2), then Scout or Recycle to keep digging. Adapt = Block is defensive fallback. With chain 2 and enemy vulnerable, next turn could be explosive. Question: does player understand Foresight is free (0 AP), making it always correct to play? And does Adapt's auto-block help here vs a multi-hit? (Block absorbs all hits until depleted.)
